questionHtml:
Mosaic Industries negotiates a new deal with their phone case supplier. Under the new deal, the supplier agrees to discount the cost of each case based on the number of cases purchased by Mosaic Industries. The cost charged by the supplier for each case can be found using the function

Cn=10-0.0001n

where n represents the number of cases sold by Mosaic Industries.

Hence, find the selling price, per case, that Mosaic Industries should choose in order to maximize their average monthly profit under the new deal.

meta.title: Hence, find the selling price, per case, that Mosaic Industries should choose in order to maximize their average monthly profit under the new deal.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 5.6—Stationary points, local max and min
